violations.text: Raw animal foods such as eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as butter and boba in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Establishment was observed selling bottled shots of electrolyte beverage. HACCP plan is required. PIC informed that HACCP plan and approval from RIDOH CFP is required. PIC voluntarily decided to remove bottled product from retail sale and removed product from premises during time of inspection. Establishment to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Protein powders observed stored at bar with lids opened in close proximity to guest seating. Sneeze guard required. Food on display shall be protected from contamination by the use of packaging, partitioned counter or service line, food guards, display cases; or other effective means. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Raw animal foods such as eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as protein balls in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

Protein powders observed stored at bar with lids opened in close proximity to guest seating. Sneeze guard required. Food on display shall be protected from contamination by the use of packaging, partitioned counter or service line, food guards, display cases; or other effective means. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
